objective: Product teams launch new services without waiting on anyone else
strategic_priority: Break the toil trap by building a guardrailed golden path for service creation, freeing SRE capacity and unblocking product team velocity

key_results.description: Product teams onboard new services to production in hours instead of weeks, measured by median time from service request to first production deployment dropping from 2-3 weeks to under 2 days

SREs spend their time on reliability engineering instead of manual configuration toil, measured by percentage of SRE time spent on manual service onboarding dropping from approximately 60% to under 20%
key_results.unit: percent (SRE time on manual onboarding toil)

key_results.description: New services ship with consistent observability out of the box, measured by percentage of wizard-created services that meet the observability baseline (error rate alerts, dashboards, log aggregation) at launch reaching 100%
key_results.unit: percent (services meeting observability baseline at launch)
